pois.name: Ferry Dock
pois.summary: Probable arrival and departure point for resort guests and ferry operations.
pois.canonStatus: Inferred from visible transport and map references

evidence.label: Map relationship
evidence.note: Coastal access implies a guest arrival route connected to the main resort path.

evidence.label: Transport role
evidence.note: The ferry is treated as a recurring access method in the project design.

pois.name: Main Lodge
pois.summary: Central guest-facing facility used as the primary orientation point in the game layout.
pois.canonStatus: Gameplay interpretation based on resort operations needs

evidence.label: Guest flow
evidence.note: A central lodge supports arrival, summary screens, and staff routing.

pois.name: Beach Path
pois.summary: A scenic traversal route that connects relaxation areas to the main resort loop.
pois.canonStatus: Original for gameplay until stronger frame evidence is added

evidence.label: Gameplay need
evidence.note: The island needs a readable walking loop that feels resort-like and supports exploration.
